title: Look
description: A Look is a saved query with a visualization. Looks can be shared, embedded, scheduled for delivery, and added to dashboards as tiles.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for this Look

content_metadata_id.description: ID of the content metadata record

query_id.description: ID of the query associated with this Look

space_id.description: ID of the space (folder) containing this Look

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this Look

user_id.description: ID of the user who created this Look

public.description: Whether this Look is publicly accessible

is_run_on_load.description: Whether the query runs automatically when the Look is loaded

created_at.description: Timestamp when the Look was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the Look was last updated

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the Look was soft-deleted

deleted.description: Whether this Look has been soft-deleted

last_accessed_at.description: Timestamp when the Look was last viewed

view_count.description: Number of times the Look has been viewed

favorite_count.description: Number of users who have favorited this Look

url.description: Relative URL path for this Look
